steps.canonical_text: Move them out of the cold, wind, and wet conditions and replace wet clothing with dry layers.
Warm the chest, neck, and groin first with blankets or body heat, not the arms and legs first.
must_keep_keywords: not the arms and legs first

steps.canonical_text: If fully alert and able to swallow, give a warm sweet non-alcoholic drink.
Call emergency services if shivering stops, confusion worsens, or they become drowsy.
